title: Stainless Steel Cat Litter Tray, Litter Box for Large and Small Cats, High Sided Metal Litter Tray, Toilet for Cat Kitten Rabbit and Guinea Pig, Non-Stick, Odor-Free, Easy to Clean
features: 【Compact Yet Practical Design】: This 15.6"L×11.6"W×3.9"H stainless steel cat litter tray provides generous space for kittens and medium-sized cats while its 3.9" raised sides help keep messes contained. Designed for felines who prefer non-enclosed environments, it easily fits in corners or tight spots, offering a tidy yet comfortable solution.

【Odour-Free & Hygienic Surface】: Crafted from premium stainless steel, this tray boasts a smooth, non-stick finish that resists clumps and resists clumping and maintains hygiene, ensuring quick maintenance. Natural odour control keeps your home fresh, while its sleek form minimises residue. It's easy to clean and use, promoting a healthier environment for you and your pet.

【Spill-Proof & Pet-Safe】: The elevated sides effectively contain litter scatter, making cleanup simpler—even for cats with high-spray habits. Rounded edges and a polished finish eliminate sharp corners, reducing any risk of cuts for both you and your pet. This thoughtful design ensures worry-free handling during daily scooping or repositioning.

【Durable Multi-Pet Solution】: Built from rust-resistant material, this robust tray endures scratching, chewing, and playful nudges, making it ideal for rabbits, guinea pigs, ferrets, and cats of all sizes. Thanks to its roomy interior, it even doubles as a handy pet wash basin or versatile storage bin, offering broad usage for busy pet families.

【Bonus Silicone Anti-Slip Pads】: These four circular silicone pads attach to the bottom corners of the stainless steel tray, helping keep it securely in place on smooth surfaces. By reducing sliding and noise when your cat digs or jumps, they protect the floors. Easy to clean and quick to apply, they enhance overall stability for a calmer, tidier home.

specifications_table.Storage Information: ‎Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight and moisture.
